subject: [PATCH pynfs 03/13] server41tests: test async COPY with OFFLOAD_STATUS polling

2026-07-09.patch_summary: This patch adds a new test case for asynchronous file copying in the NFSv4.1 server. The test writes 1MB of data to a source file, requests an asynchronous copy operation, and then polls the OFFLOAD_STATUS until completion or a timeout is reached. If the server chooses to perform the copy synchronously, the test still verifies the result. The patch also introduces a helper function _poll_offload_status() that polls OFFLOAD_STATUS in a loop until the copy completes or a timeout is reached.
